summary: Classified the five live PR inventory targets independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were present, and no close/merge/fix actions are allowed or justified for this shard.

actions.reason: Useful open contributor PR with its own feature scope; keep it out of this inventory cleanup shard rather than closing or promoting it.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with active maintainer signal; keep open and independent from this cleanup shard.
Broad active contributor PR with review context and waiting-author status; keep it open rather than closing or treating it as a merge/fix candidate in this shard.
Focused useful bug-fix PR requiring maintainer review; keep open and independent from the inventory cleanup shard.
Open contributor bug-fix PR with active review/author follow-up; keep open and independent from this inventory cleanup shard.
